plugins.name: hyperfleet-architecture
plugins.description: Provides HyperFleet architecture knowledge for answering questions about design patterns, versioning strategies, configuration standards, and core principles

plugins.name: hyperfleet-jira
plugins.description: JIRA integration for sprint management, task tracking, ticket triage, and story point estimation using jira-cli

plugins.name: hyperfleet-standards
plugins.description: Audits HyperFleet repositories against team architecture standards dynamically fetched from the architecture repo, producing JIRA-ready gap specifications

plugins.name: hyperfleet-operational-readiness
plugins.description: Audits HyperFleet repositories for operational readiness including health probes, dead man's switch metrics, retry logic, PDB, resource limits, and reliability documentation

plugins.name: hyperfleet-devtools
plugins.description: Development assistance tools for HyperFleet - commit message generation, architecture impact analysis, E2E test case design, E2E test automation, E2E CI failure debugging, and more

plugins.name: hyperfleet-code-review
plugins.description: Code review skills for HyperFleet: /review-local reviews local branch changes against HyperFleet standards. /review-pr provides full PR review with JIRA validation, impact analysis, and interactive recommendations.

plugins.name: hyperfleet-work-triage
plugins.description: Work triage skills for HyperFleet: /bugs-triage for interactive JIRA bug and GitHub issue triage. /open-prs surfaces and prioritizes open PRs across the org using GitHub + JIRA context with multi-factor scoring and confidence levels.

plugins.name: hyperfleet-release
plugins.description: Release tooling for HyperFleet: /release-notes generates a deterministic release-notes draft from the release manifest and git history, categorizing real commits (feat/fix/security/perf) for human curation.

plugins.name: hyperfleet-hooks
plugins.description: Claude Code hooks for automated quality checks
